task_description: Implement foundational infrastructure for the Sleep Audio Pipeline: Input S3 bucket (KMS encrypted, versioned, with EventBridge notifications), Output S3 bucket (encrypted, versioned), and EventBridge rule triggered on Object Created events. Follow strict TDD with tests first. Update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: Build succeeds with 0 warnings/errors. All 8 tests pass (0 failures, 0 skipped). Tests are meaningful - each verifies specific CDK resource properties that would fail if implementation were reverted. cdk synth produces valid CloudFormation with S3 buckets, EventBridge rule, SQS queue, and supporting IAM resources.
